articles.title: Senate Hearing Exposes Years-Long Cover-Up of COVID Vaccine Cancer Link
articles.summary: U.S. Senate hearing revealed suppressed evidence linking COVID-19 mRNA vaccines to increased cancer risk. Multiple oncologists testified that stable cancer patients experienced aggressive relapses after booster shots, while researchers reported systematic attacks on their reputations for publishing these findings.

articles.title: Major Medical Journal Caught Burying Pfizer's Failed Flu Vaccine Data in Seniors
articles.summary: A major medical journal is under fire for deliberately omitting Pfizer's failed flu vaccine efficacy data in elderly populations. The suppression of negative trial results represents another example of how Big Pharma manipulates the scientific literature to hide product failures.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Whistleblower Exposes Ohio's 'National Embarrassment'
articles.summary: Mehek Cooke testified before Congress about systematic Medicaid fraud in Ohio, revealing a lack of political will to confront healthcare corruption. Her testimony exposed how state officials deliberately ignored evidence of widespread fraud to protect political interests.

articles.title: FDA Medical Authoritarians Wage Systematic War on Health Freedom
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney Jonathan Emord and Dr. Robert Verkerk expose how the U.S. government and FDA have systematically dismantled health freedom through regulatory capture. The analysis reveals decades of coordinated efforts to suppress alternative medicine and decentralized healthcare solutions.

articles.title: Moffitt Cancer Center Executive Steps Down Following Research Misconduct Probe
articles.summary: A high-level executive at Moffitt Cancer Center resigned following an internal investigation into research misconduct. The departure highlights ongoing integrity problems in cancer research institutions, while NSF's empty watchdog unit suggests systemic failure in scientific oversight.

articles.title: Microplastics Linked to Chronic Disease While Regulators Stay Silent
articles.summary: Emerging evidence definitively links microplastics absorbed through air, food and water to chronic diseases, with plastic particles now detected deep within human organs and circulating in bloodstreams. Despite overwhelming evidence of harm, regulatory agencies continue to ignore this environmental health crisis.

The report exposes deliberate suppression of dissenting voices within the medical establishment.
